ai.title: Judicial Integrity in the Age of AI: Safeguarding Human Judgment
ai.description: Justice B V Nagarathna stressed that judicial independence today requires freedom from external power and algorithmic influence. While AI can support legal systems, human judgment must remain core in decision-making, guided by constitutional values. Excessive reliance on AI poses cognitive risks, making human oversight essential.
